description.ko: 기하학적 파편으로 산산조각 나는 거대한 흑요석 구체를 통해 디지털 오염과 수학적 완벽함 사이의 긴장감을 탐구합니다.
description.en: A monolithic obsidian sphere shattering into geometric shards, exploring the tension between digital corruption and mathematical perfection.

prompt: A brutalist digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Void’s Defragmentation.' A massive #1A1A1A obsidian sphere suspended in a clinical #FFFFFF void, captured at the precise moment of a geometric explosion. The core shatters into thousands of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards that remain suspended in a state of digital freeze-frame. Thick digital glitch artifacts, pixel sorting layers, and intense RGB chromatic aberration slice through the composition. High-contrast ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, mathematical chaos and order.
